basics.description: Deploy an Azure Automation account (PowerShell 7.4 runtime) and runbooks for MSSP/SOC operations.

basics.name: automationAccountName
basics.label: Automation Account name
basics.toolTip: Name of the new Automation Account.

constraints.validationMessage: Use 2-50 characters: letters, numbers, and hyphens. Must start and end with alphanumeric.

basics.name: userAssignedIdentityName
basics.label: User Assigned Managed Identity (in selected resource group)
basics.toolTip: Select an existing User Assigned Managed Identity in the resource group chosen on the Basics tab.

options.text: Select the Log Analytics workspace that Microsoft Sentinel uses. This picker returns the workspace resource ID, which is passed directly to the template as the sentinel workspace parameter.

elements.name: sentinelWorkspace
elements.label: Sentinel Log Analytics workspace
elements.toolTip: Pick the workspace resource. The full resource ID is captured and passed to the template as sentinelWorkspaceResourceId.

constraints.validationMessage: Select the Sentinel Log Analytics workspace before continuing.

options.text: Runtime is configured by this deployment template. You may also need to enable the new runtime experience in the Azure Portal by going to Automation Account > Runbooks > Runtime settings and selecting 'PowerShell_74_SOC' as the default runtime version. You can verify the runtime environment by checking the 'Runtime version' field in the Azure Portal under the Automation Account > Runbooks > Runtime settings section after deployment.

elements.name: runtimeEnvironmentName
elements.label: Runtime environment name
elements.toolTip: Name of the Automation runtime environment that runbooks will reference.

constraints.validationMessage: Use 2-64 characters: letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens. Must start and end with alphanumeric.

elements.name: runtimeVersion
elements.label: PowerShell runtime version
elements.toolTip: PowerShell version for the runtime environment resource.

options.text: Service principal credential runbook name: Update-AppRegistrationCredential

elements.name: servicePrincipalCredentialRunbookContentUri
elements.label: Service principal credential runbook content URI
elements.toolTip: URL for the service principal credential runbook content.

elements.name: connectorRunbookContentUri
elements.label: Data connector runbook content URI
elements.toolTip: URL for the data connector runbook content.

elements.name: pricingRunbookContentUri
elements.label: Pricing runbook content URI
elements.toolTip: URL for the pricing runbook content.

elements.name: policyRunbookContentUri
elements.label: Azure Policy runbook content URI
elements.toolTip: URL for the Azure Policy runbook content.

elements.name: servicePrincipalCredentialLogicAppUri
elements.label: Service principal credential Logic App URI
elements.toolTip: HTTP endpoint used by the runbook to update credentials via Logic App.

constraints.validationMessage: Enter a valid HTTPS URL for the Logic App endpoint.

elements.name: servicePrincipalCredentialAppReg
elements.label: Sentinel ingestion app registration name
elements.toolTip: Name of the app registration (service principal) used for Sentinel ingestion.

elements.name: dataConnectorLogicAppUri
elements.label: Data connector Logic App URI
elements.toolTip: HTTP endpoint used by the runbook to post connector status via Logic App.

constraints.validationMessage: Enter a valid HTTPS URL for the Logic App endpoint.

elements.name: pricingTierLogicAppUri
elements.label: Pricing tier API URI
elements.toolTip: HTTP endpoint used by the runbook to retrieve Sentinel pricing tier information.

constraints.validationMessage: Enter a valid HTTPS URL for the pricing tier Logic App endpoint.

elements.name: policyMonitoringLogicAppUri
elements.label: Policy monitoring Logic App URI
elements.toolTip: HTTP endpoint used by the runbook to post Azure Policy inventory updates via Logic App.

constraints.validationMessage: Enter a valid HTTPS URL for the policy monitoring Logic App endpoint.
